observations: Panel B shows a direct popup for Takahara Kumano Shrine (location-mapgenie-437477) with a circular shrine marker selected.
Panel A shows multiple shrine markers on the Kii regional map with north-up orientation.
The shrine marker immediately west/left of the Takahara marker is distinct and visible in Panel A.
Candidate positions confirm that Tokei Shrine (location-mapgenie-438414) is the only listed shrine west/left of Takahara Kumano Shrine.
All other candidate shrines are east/right of Takahara Kumano Shrine, making the west/left marker uniquely identifiable as Tokei Shrine.
reviewPackets.reasonZhCN: 根据Panel B中高原熊野神社的直接弹窗和选中标记，结合Panel A中地图上高原熊野神社左侧明显的另一个神社标记，且候选位置中只有常磐神社位于高原熊野神社的西侧，其他神社均位于东侧，因此可以唯一确认左侧标记为常磐神社，符合确认条件。

observations: Panel A shows a distinct shrine marker west/left of the Takahara marker.
The geometry of the markers uniquely identifies Tokei Shrine as the only candidate west of Takahara.
reviewPackets.reasonZhCN: 面板A显示了在高原熊野神社左侧的独特神社标记，且几何形状唯一地确认了它是东纪神社。
